headline: Does Coca-Cola’s New Global HR Leader Subtly Shift Its Long-Term Talent Strategy Narrative (KO)?
summary: The Coca-Cola Company recently announced that Tapaswee Chandele will become global chief people officer on May 1, 2026, succeeding Lisa Chang, who will stay through year-end as a senior advisor and serve on The Coca-Cola Foundation’s board. Chandele’s appointment, after more than two decades rising through Coca-Cola’s global HR ranks and board roles in India and the US, highlights the company’s emphasis on internal talent development and leadership continuity. We’ll now examine how this...

headline: Dividend King PepsiCo's Q1 Shows That Its Turnaround Isn't Just Talk
summary: PepsiCo delivered a strong Q1, beating revenue and EPS estimates, with organic growth and margin expansion confirming the turnaround narrative. Learn more about PEP stock here.

headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Keeps Delivering as Markets Turn Ugly. The Bull Case Still Holds
summary: Coca-Cola (KO) continues to deliver steady performance amid volatile markets, reinforcing its bull case as a top high-quality compounder to own when the macro backdrop is messy. The stock is up about 9% year-to-date, comfortably ahead of the S&P 500’s (SPX) low-single-digit return over the same period, yet I still think Coca-Cola has room to run higher. Coca-Cola is not a hyper-growth story, but that misses the point. This is a global beverage leader with one of the deepest distribution systems

raw.headline: Coca-Cola (KO) Keeps Delivering as Markets Turn Ugly. The Bull Case Still Holds
raw.summary: Coca-Cola (KO) continues to deliver steady performance amid volatile markets, reinforcing its bull case as a top high-quality compounder to own when the macro backdrop is messy. The stock is up about 9% year-to-date, comfortably ahead of the S&P 500’s (SPX) low-single-digit return over the same period, yet I still think Coca-Cola has room to run higher. Coca-Cola is not a hyper-growth story, but that misses the point. This is a global beverage leader with one of the deepest distribution systems
